  • Constructor Details

    • ScoreGame

      public ScoreGame()
      A no-arg constructor for the ScoreGame class.

    • ScoreGame

      public ScoreGame(ArrayList<String> players) throws IllegalArgumentException
      A constructor immediately incorporating the players into the game.
      Parameters:
      players - The players playing this game.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - The players are not of correct size.

  • Method Details

    • initializeHumanPlayers

      public void initializeHumanPlayers(ArrayList<String> players) throws IllegalArgumentException, IllegalStateException
      A method initializing given players for a game.
      Parameters:
      players - The human players to be added to the game.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - The number of players provided isn't correct.
      IllegalStateException - The game already had specified players.

      Precondition: The number of players provided is 4: players.size() == 4

    • startNewRound

      public void startNewRound()
      Description copied from class: Game
      A method for starting a new round. This is an abstract method, because the implementation depends on the type of game.
      Specified by:
      startNewRound in class Game

    • registerBids

      public void registerBids(HashMap<String,String> bids)
      Transforms a String-BidType map into a Player-BidType ordered map and delegates to ScoreRound.
      Overrides:
      registerBids in class Game
      Parameters:
      bids - The map of player names to bids.

      A simple getter returning the current round in this score game.
